name: Parse sensor
Format CSV line
Split to chart points
MQTT Out (data)
Format MQTT payload (live)
db_function
func:
let p = msg.payload || {};

// use wall-clock time for DB primary key
const ts = Date.now();

function sqlNum(v) {
    return (v === undefined || v === null || v === "" || Number.isNaN(Number(v)))
        ? "NULL"
        : Number(v);
}

function sqlBool(v) {
    if (v === true || v === 1 || v === "1") return 1;
    if (v === false || v === 0 || v === "0") return 0;
    return "NULL";
}

function sqlText(v) {
    if (v === undefined || v === null || v === "") return "NULL";
    return "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'";
}

// compatibility values for older dashboard/queries
let compat_t = sqlNum(p.temp_f);
let compat_h = sqlNum(p.rh_pct);

let soils = [p.soil1_pct, p.soil2_pct, p.soil3_pct, p.soil4_pct]
    .filter(v => v !== undefined && v !== null && !Number.isNaN(Number(v)))
    .map(Number);

let compat_soil = soils.length
    ? soils.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / soils.length
    : null;

let controllerFault = (p.fault === undefined || p.fault === null || Number.isNaN(Number(p.fault)))
    ? 0
    : Number(p.fault);

let faultCount = controllerFault !== 0 ? 1 : 0;
let systemFault = controllerFault !== 0 ? 1 : 0;

msg.topic =
  "INSERT INTO greenhouse_samples (" +
  "ts, t1, t2, tavg, h1, h2, havg, soil, lux, " +
  "louvre_pct, louvre_state, fan_pct, lightOn, fault_count, system_fault, " +
  "mode, irrigation_mode, temp_f, rh_pct, tank_temp_f, " +
  "soil1_raw, soil1_pct, soil2_raw, soil2_pct, soil3_raw, soil3_pct, soil4_raw, soil4_pct, " +
  "batt_v, pv_v, pv_present, louvre_pos_pct, " +
  "row1, row2, row3, row4, row1_en, row2_en, row3_en, row4_en, " +
  "row1_ms, row2_ms, row3_ms, row4_ms, " +
  "row1_start_pct, row2_start_pct, row3_start_pct, row4_start_pct, " +
  "row1_stop_pct, row2_stop_pct, row3_stop_pct, row4_stop_pct, " +
  "pump_on, heater_on, light_on, fan_pwm, " +
  "rows_run_active, rows_run_auto, active_row, " +
  "temp_open_f, temp_close_f, rh_open_pct, " +
  "tank_heat_on_f, tank_heat_off_f, schedule_interval_ms, eco_mode, controller_fault" +
  ") VALUES (" +
  sqlNum(ts) + ", " +

  compat_t + ", " + compat_t + ", " + compat_t + ", " +
  compat_h + ", " + compat_h + ", " + compat_h + ", " +
  sqlNum(compat_soil) + ", " + sqlNum(p.lux) + ", " +

  sqlNum(p.louvre_pos_pct) + ", " +
  sqlText(p.louvre_state) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.fan_pct !== undefined ? p.fan_pct : p.fan_pwm) + ", " +
  sqlBool(p.light_on) + ", " +

  sqlNum(faultCount) + ", " +
  sqlNum(systemFault) + ", " +

  sqlText(p.mode) + ", " +
  sqlText(p.irrigation_mode) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.temp_f) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.rh_pct) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.tank_temp_f) + ", " +

  sqlNum(p.soil1_raw) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.soil1_pct) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.soil2_raw) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.soil2_pct) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.soil3_raw) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.soil3_pct) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.soil4_raw) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.soil4_pct) + ", " +

  sqlNum(p.batt_v) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.pv_v) + ", " +
  sqlBool(p.pv_present) + ", " +

  sqlNum(p.louvre_pos_pct) + ", " +

  sqlBool(p.row1) + ", " +
  sqlBool(p.row2) + ", " +
  sqlBool(p.row3) + ", " +
  sqlBool(p.row4) + ", " +

  sqlBool(p.row1_en) + ", " +
  sqlBool(p.row2_en) + ", " +
  sqlBool(p.row3_en) + ", " +
  sqlBool(p.row4_en) + ", " +

  sqlNum(p.row1_ms) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.row2_ms) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.row3_ms) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.row4_ms) + ", " +

  sqlNum(p.row1_start_pct) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.row2_start_pct) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.row3_start_pct) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.row4_start_pct) + ", " +

  sqlNum(p.row1_stop_pct) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.row2_stop_pct) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.row3_stop_pct) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.row4_stop_pct) + ", " +

  sqlBool(p.pump_on) + ", " +
  sqlBool(p.heater_on) + ", " +
  sqlBool(p.light_on) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.fan_pwm) + ", " +

  sqlBool(p.rows_run_active) + ", " +
  sqlBool(p.rows_run_auto) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.active_row) + ", " +

  sqlNum(p.temp_open_f) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.temp_close_f) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.rh_open_pct) + ", " +

  sqlNum(p.tank_heat_on_f) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.tank_heat_off_f) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.schedule_interval_ms) + ", " +
  sqlBool(p.eco_mode) + ", " +
  sqlNum(controllerFault) +
  ");";

msg.payload = [];
return msg;

name: Format MQTT payload

rules.to: SELECT ts, t1, t2, tavg, h1, h2, havg, soil, lux, louvre_pct, louvre_state, fan_pct, lightOn, fault_count, system_fault FROM greenhouse_samples ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1;

name: Temperature
Humidity
GH Lighting
Soil Row 1
Louvre Status
function 1
func:
msg.payload = "timestamp,ts_ms,mode,irrigation_mode,temp_f,rh_pct,tank_temp_f,lux,soil1_raw,soil1_pct,soil2_raw,soil2_pct,soil3_raw,soil3_pct,soil4_raw,soil4_pct,soil_avg_pct,batt_v,pv_v,pv_present,louvre_state,louvre_pos_pct,row1,row2,row3,row4,row1_en,row2_en,row3_en,row4_en,row1_ms,row2_ms,row3_ms,row4_ms,row1_start_pct,row2_start_pct,row3_start_pct,row4_start_pct,row1_stop_pct,row2_stop_pct,row3_stop_pct,row4_stop_pct,pump_on,heater_on,light_on,fan_pwm,fan_pct,rows_run_active,rows_run_auto,active_row,temp_open_f,temp_close_f,rh_open_pct,tank_heat_on_f,tank_heat_off_f,schedule_interval_ms,eco_mode,fault\n";
return msg;

return msg;
